hooks.command: MSG='Post-clear: review skills (.claude/skills/*/SKILL.md), agents (.claude/agents/*.md), prefer scripts/*.sh over raw bash.'; printf '%s\n' "$MSG" >&2; echo "$MSG After /clear, read .claude/skills/*/SKILL.md descriptions and .claude/agents/*.md to re-establish awareness of available automation. Prefer existing scripts (scripts/*.sh) over complex inline bash. Check git status for uncommitted changes. Check gh issue list -l bot for active delegations."
